entries.controls: Advanced env editor (apply selected env var). This is migration-oriented: secrets are set for the current process only; internal wiring keys may persist under the legacy `env` section (allowlisted); non-secret legacy keys are migrated into structured settings fields.
entries.controls_plain: Advanced TUI control for applying secrets for this session and migrating legacy keys into settings.
entries.keep_configurable_justification: Advanced controls support credential setup and migration without requiring manual file edits.

entries.controls: Advanced env editor (apply default for selected env var). This is migration-oriented: secrets are set for the current process only; internal wiring keys may persist under the legacy `env` section (allowlisted); non-secret legacy keys are migrated into structured settings fields.
entries.controls_plain: Advanced TUI control for applying secrets for this session and migrating legacy keys into settings.
entries.keep_configurable_justification: Advanced controls support credential setup and migration without requiring manual file edits.

entries.controls: Advanced env editor (unset selected env var). This is migration-oriented: secrets are set for the current process only; internal wiring keys may persist under the legacy `env` section (allowlisted); non-secret legacy keys are migrated into structured settings fields.
entries.controls_plain: Advanced TUI control for applying secrets for this session and migrating legacy keys into settings.
entries.keep_configurable_justification: Advanced controls support credential setup and migration without requiring manual file edits.

entries.controls: Persists workspace settings derived from legacy key identifiers: SWARMEE_CONTEXT_MANAGER. (These identifiers are migrated to structured `.swarmee/settings.json` fields; they are no longer applied as generic env overrides.)
entries.controls_plain: Selects a runtime option in the TUI and saves it for this workspace.
entries.keep_configurable_justification: Select controls make high-frequency runtime strategy changes discoverable.

exceptions: Secrets/credentials are read from process environment (including `.env` for local dev).
Alias fallback chains are preserved for backward compatibility.
